Global Variable# kDNSServiceErr_NoRouter

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceErr_NoRouter: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceErr_NoRouter#Discussion)

No router is currently configured (probably no network connectivity).
